title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Walker Chandiok

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Walker Chandiok
jsonLd.description:
Walker Chandiok is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Walker Chandiok:
Walker Chandiok is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok!
